title: Lesson 3
paragraph: The community center has an available room for a general study group. The official rules are practical, and the room is ready for busy students. The class feels similar to school, but each student has a personal goal. A responsible leader chooses suitable tasks and gives healthy advice.

words.meaning: ready to be used or free to help
words.japaneseMeaning: 利用できる、空いている
words.example: A study room is available after three o'clock.

words.meaning: almost the same but not exactly the same
words.example: My bag is similar to yours, but mine is blue.

words.meaning: right for a particular person, place, or purpose
words.example: These shoes are suitable for a long walk.

words.meaning: approved by a person or group in authority
words.example: The official results will appear on the school website.

words.meaning: belonging to or connected with one person
words.example: Please do not put personal information in a public chat.

words.meaning: not detailed or not limited to one small part
words.example: The teacher gave a general explanation before the activity.

words.meaning: good for your body or mind
words.example: A healthy breakfast helps me study in the morning.
The students are ready for the speaking test.
This course teaches practical skills for office work.

words.meaning: trusted to do what is needed or expected
words.japaneseMeaning: 責任感のある、責任がある
words.example: A responsible student returns library books on time.
